System Requirements¶

System Requirement: A standalone command-line shell shall be provided to control Synarius Core. CORE-SYS-001
System Requirement: Projects shall be loadable from text-based script files and executable line-by-line as commands. CORE-SYS-002
System Requirement: The system shall support an explicit Edit mode and Simulation mode. CORE-SYS-003
System Requirement: FMU elements shall be loadable and executable according to the FMI init/step lifecycle. CORE-SYS-004
System Requirement: Signal sources (at minimum MDF and CSV) shall be loadable and mappable to variables. CORE-SYS-005
System Requirement: Variables shall be stimulatable and measurable during simulation mode. CORE-SYS-006
System Requirement: Simulation data shall be visualizable in data viewers with cyclic updates. CORE-SYS-007
System Requirement: Selected or all variables shall be recordable and exportable to MDF. CORE-SYS-008
System Requirement: Submodules should be embeddable as blocks and integrable into a simulation. CORE-SYS-009

synarius-core
